data.body:
CODE FIXES committed on branch worktree-jira-sync-automation (commit b23b3cce):
- FIX 2 (inbound scoping): fetcher.py JQL was hardcoded 'project = DIG'; now built from jira.project via jql_active/jql_done_recent/jqls_for; empty/invalid key fails closed. VERIFIED LIVE: reconcile-check unbound_jira 978 (DIG) -> 0 (REB).
- FIX 1 (outbound guard): applier._apply_batch pre-flight refuses (CrossProjectTargetError, fail-closed, no partial writes) any outbound update/delete targeting a project != configured jira.project. Creates + inbound exempt.
- Tests: +test_fetcher_project_scoped_jql.py, +test_applier_cross_project_guard.py (RED->GREEN). conftest autouse pins JIRA_PROJECT=DIG for legacy DIG-keyed tests; 2 DSO-keyed applier files pin DSO. Full reconciler suite 989 passed; integration 23 passed; ruff clean.
REMAINING — FIX 3 (re-target THIS store to REB): clear 62 DIG bindings (.bridge_state/bindings.json) + strip dso-id:jira-dig-* tags from local tickets + purge-bridge --keep=REB. This bulk-creates ~400 REB issues + rewrites the shared store, so it's a deliberate live cutover pending user confirmation.
